_comment: Karma Demon — Renegade Immortal. A being formed from accumulated negative karma. Canon: appears where great atrocities occurred. Feeds on karmic debt.
name: Karma Demon

canonical.appearance: A shifting shadow form with crimson eyes. The surrounding area darkens. Emits a heavy pressure that cultivators can feel through divine sense. Sometimes takes the form of those it has consumed.
canonical.behavior: Drawn to beings with heavy karmic debt. Can sense karma through divine sense. Attacks by inflicting karmic backlash. Powerful but slow to form and disperses if karma source is purified.
canonical.habitat: Sites of great slaughter, corrupted spirit veins, karmically heavy locations
canonical.cultivation: Core Formation to Nascent Soul equivalent (scales with accumulated karma)
canonical.intelligence: 5-7 (understands karma and cultivator weaknesses, can strategize)
canonical.diet: Feeds on the karmic debt of cultivators and the residual karma of massacre sites
canonical.relationships: Attracted to cultivators who have killed heavily. Can be temporarily appeased by karmic purification techniques. Natural enemy of cultivators on the Samsara Dao path.
techniques: Karma strike (damage scales with target's negative karma)
Karma mirror (reflects the last damage type received)
Debt sense (reveals target's approximate kill count)
Form shift (takes appearance of a consumed victim)
mutations: Karma Scaling — damage increases by 10% for each kill the target has committed
canonical.ecology: Apex predator of karmically-corrupted areas. Does not reproduce — manifests from accumulated karma exceeding a threshold. Rare but devastating.

art_direction.model_notes: Shifting shadowy humanoid. Red eye glow. Dark aura particle effect. Form flickers and distorts.
art_direction.texture_notes: Dark red-black shifting form. Solid crimson eyes. Wisps of shadow trail behind.
